notes: Active - shows a 'Checking site... Please standby' toast, then runs several DOM/cookie/HTML heuristics plus up to 6 fetch/HEAD requests (/wp-login.php, /wp-admin/, /wp-json/, /xmlrpc.php, /readme.html) to determine if the site runs WordPress. Displays results in a modal titled 'WordPress Detection' with a verdict (LIKELY/POSSIBLY/UNLIKELY WordPress) and a checklist, plus a 'List User Accounts' button that (after a warning) opens /wp-json/wp/v2/users in a new tab. hatless1der.com is explicitly referenced in the bookmarklet's own description as a known WordPress test site. Longer wait_ms allows the async fetch checks to complete.

checks.comment: Confirm the WordPress REST API endpoint was probed
